channel.title: docker on Fundor 333
channel.description: Recent content in docker on Fundor 333

item.title: Hugo into Docker
item.description: This blog is publish with a docker image with GitLab. But I don’t like the image I was using because wasn’t update and it’s big and havy. So I fork the project for create an update version for my personal blog.

item.title: Hugo into Docker
item.description: This blog is publish with a docker image with GitLab. But I don’t like the image I was using because wasn’t update and it’s big and havy. So I fork the project for create an update version for my personal blog.

item.title: Docker, la balena con i container per software
item.description: Oggi parliamo di balene e di Virtual Machine, ovvero parliamo di Docker.
